title: Food Benefits
description: Change how food works in Minecraft
body:
# Food Benefits

![food effects](https://i.imgur.com/S6ZPghc.png)

## Description:

Inspired by games like _The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild_, where some foods grant special effects, this mod was developed to bring a similar experience to Minecraft's food system.

Now, food can grant effects with customizable potency and duration, as well as heal or damage the player.

The goal is to make food more interesting for various situations.

## Features:

*   Food can be consumed at any time or within a configured time frame.
*   Food can give or remove effects.
*   Food can heal players.

## Modpack Creators:

How to create a Data Pack [here](https://gitlab.com/ragnardragus/foodbenefits/-/wikis/Food-Benefits-Data-Packs).

How to use KubeJS integration [here](https://gitlab.com/ragnardragus/foodbenefits/-/wikis/Adding-Benefits-with-KubeJS)
